---
title: "Our poster in CLAPEM"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-09-24"
categories:
  - "Colombia"
  - "Estadística"
  - "R"
  - "Stats"
---

[In this poster](http://gutierrezandres.files.wordpress.com/2014/09/poster_cartagena.pdf) we introduce the bayesian modeling of the Gini coefficient per locality in Bogotá by using a Beta regressión. R-codes are available after requesting to the first author. Enjoy it!
